content: We can embed a lightweight modified ICM curiosity module into the Chain of Hindsight (CoH) alignment pipeline, where the intrinsic reward generated by ICM incentivizes the language model to actively explore diverse feedback trajectories that it has not yet encountered, rather than only passively fine-tuning on fixed collected human feedback. This turns the static one-pass feedback alignment process into an active self-improving cycle where the model generates its own learning signal to expand the scope of alignment.
